
---
title: "Figure 6 — ROS × Morphological State Analysis at 24 hr"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(here)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, cache = FALSE)

if (!exists("final_features") || !exists("add_morphology_axes") ||
    !exists("assign_cells_to_nearest_anchor")) {
  source(here::here("R", "load_and_preprocess.R"))
}
required_pkgs <- c("lme4", "lmerTest", "emmeans")
missing_pkgs <- required_pkgs[!sapply(required_pkgs, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(missing_pkgs) > 0) {
  install.packages(missing_pkgs, repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(patchwork)
  library(ggpubr)
  library(ggrepel)
  library(lme4)
  library(lmerTest)
  library(emmeans)
})

ANCHOR_FILE <- here::here("R", "state_anchors.rds")
stopifnot(file.exists(ANCHOR_FILE))

OUT_DIR    <- here::here("output")
FIG_PREFIX <- file.path(OUT_DIR, "Figure6")
dir.create(OUT_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Load frozen anchors + scaling (same as Figure 3/5)
anchor_bundle <- readRDS(ANCHOR_FILE)
state_anchors <- anchor_bundle$anchors
state_scaling <- anchor_bundle$scaling
cat("Loaded anchors:\n"); print(state_anchors)
cat("\nLoaded scaling:\n"); print(state_scaling)

# ---- Config ----
TREATMENTS_6 <- c("Vehicle", "LPS", "IFNg", "IL1beta", "IL6", "TNFa")
target_stimuli <- setdiff(TREATMENTS_6, "Vehicle")
STATE_LEVELS <- c("Elongated","Spread","Ramified","Small_Round")

STATE_COLORS <- c(
  "Elongated"   = "#FF85C0",
  "Spread"      = "#00CED1",
  "Ramified"    = "#FFD700",
  "Small_Round" = "#8B4513"
)
PAL_6 <- c(
  "Vehicle" = "black", "LPS" = "#AB3A29", "IFNg" = "#D07F2C",
  "IL1beta" = "#1E7C4A", "IL6" = "#6F6DA1", "TNFa" = "#6990A2"
)

treatment_math_labels <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- gsub("TNFa",    "TNF*alpha", x)
  x <- gsub("IL1beta", "IL-1*beta", x)
  x <- gsub("IFNg",    "IFN*gamma", x)
  x
}

transparent_theme <- theme(
  plot.background       = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
  panel.background      = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
  legend.background     = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
  legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
  legend.key            = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA)
)
```

```{r load-and-merge}
ros_raw <- read_csv("data/24h_ROS_dataset.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
ros_meta <- read_csv("data/24h_ROS_Metadata.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

cat("Raw cells:", nrow(ros_raw), " | Metadata images:", nrow(ros_meta), "\n")

ros_raw <- ros_raw %>%
  left_join(ros_meta %>% select(ImageNumber, Filename, Treatment, Batch),
            by = "ImageNumber") %>%
  rename(Experiment = Batch, Stimulus = Treatment) %>%
  mutate(
    Experiment = case_when(
      Experiment %in% c("exp1","Exp1") ~ "Exp1",
      Experiment %in% c("exp2","Exp2") ~ "Exp2",
      Experiment %in% c("exp3","Exp3") ~ "Exp3",
      TRUE ~ Experiment),
    Stimulus = case_when(
      Stimulus == "IFNr" ~ "IFNg",
      TRUE ~ Stimulus)
  )

cat("\nStimulus x Experiment:\n")
print(table(ros_raw$Stimulus, ros_raw$Experiment, useNA = "ifany"))
```

```{r ros-column}
ROS_COL <- "Intensity_MeanIntensity_Gray"
stopifnot(ROS_COL %in% names(ros_raw))
ros_raw$ROS_intensity <- ros_raw[[ROS_COL]]

cat(sprintf("\nROS range: [%.4f, %.4f], median: %.4f\n",
            min(ros_raw$ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE),
            max(ros_raw$ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE),
            median(ros_raw$ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE)))
```

```{r preprocess-morphology}
# Methodologically consistent with main pipeline:
# (1) log1p transform on LOG_COLS
# (2) Per-experiment Vehicle-based centering, computed at IMAGE level
#     (not cell level; avoids weighting by image cell count)
# (3) Fixed anchor scaling for z-axes

LOG_COLS_ACTUAL <- intersect(LOG_COLS, final_features)

missing_feat <- setdiff(final_features, names(ros_raw))
if (length(missing_feat) > 0) {
  stop("ROS dataset missing morphology features: ",
       paste(missing_feat, collapse = ", "))
}

# ---- Compute Vehicle-based centering at IMAGE level ----
# 1) log-transform cell-level data
# 2) aggregate to image-level means (Vehicle only)
# 3) take unweighted experiment mean of image-level means
# This matches the baseline definition used in load_and_preprocess.R
ros_offset <- ros_raw %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(LOG_COLS_ACTUAL), log1p)) %>%
  filter(Stimulus == "Vehicle",
         complete.cases(across(all_of(final_features)))) %>%
  group_by(Experiment, ImageNumber) %>%                                      # image-level
  summarise(across(all_of(final_features), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Experiment) %>%                                                    # experiment-level
  summarise(across(all_of(final_features), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
            .groups = "drop")

cat("Vehicle-based centering offset (image-level aggregation, per experiment):\n")
print(ros_offset)

ros_centered <- ros_raw %>%
  mutate(AreaShape_Area_raw = AreaShape_Area) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(LOG_COLS_ACTUAL), log1p)) %>%
  left_join(ros_offset, by = "Experiment", suffix = c("", ".off")) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(final_features),
                ~ .x - get(paste0(cur_column(), ".off")))) %>%
  select(-ends_with(".off"))

cat(sprintf("\nCentered: %d cells\n", nrow(ros_centered)))
```

```{r assign-states}
# Apply frozen anchor scaling, then classify to nearest anchor.
# Same coordinate system as Figure 3 and Figure 5.

ros_axed <- ros_centered %>% add_morphology_axes(scaling = state_scaling)

state_axes <- c("z_elong", "z_size", "z_round")
keep_rows <- complete.cases(ros_axed[, state_axes])
cat(sprintf("Cells with complete z-axes: %d / %d (dropped %d)\n",
            sum(keep_rows), nrow(ros_axed), sum(!keep_rows)))

ros_final <- ros_axed[keep_rows, ]
ros_final$State <- factor(
  assign_cells_to_nearest_anchor(ros_final, state_anchors),
  levels = STATE_LEVELS
)
ros_final$Stimulus   <- factor(ros_final$Stimulus, levels = TREATMENTS_6)
ros_final$Experiment <- factor(ros_final$Experiment, levels = c("Exp1","Exp2","Exp3"))

cat("\nFinal state distribution:\n")
print(table(ros_final$State))
cat("\nState x Treatment:\n")
print(table(ros_final$State, ros_final$Stimulus))
```

```{r ros-summaries}
cat("\n======= ROS by Treatment =======\n")
print(ros_final %>%
  group_by(Stimulus) %>%
  summarise(n = n(),
            mean_ROS   = mean(ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE),
            median_ROS = median(ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE),
            sd_ROS     = sd(ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop"))

cat("\n======= ROS by State =======\n")
print(ros_final %>%
  group_by(State) %>%
  summarise(n = n(),
            mean_ROS   = mean(ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE),
            median_ROS = median(ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE),
            sd_ROS     = sd(ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop"))
```

```{r panel-B-ros-per-treatment, fig.width=6, fig.height=3}
# Panel B: ROS change vs Vehicle per cytokine.
# Statistical approach: LMM with Experiment as random effect, followed by
# Dunnett's many-to-one comparisons (all treatments vs Vehicle).
# Rationale:
#  - Dunnett is designed for the treatment-vs-control design and is more
#    powerful than BH-FDR, which treats comparisons as independent.
#  - LMM pools variance across all groups (df ~ 12 instead of n-1 = 2),
#    substantially improving power at n=3.
#  - log(fc) is used instead of raw delta so the test target matches
#    Panel C (H0: fold change = 1) and normalizes the multiplicative
#    measurement noise typical of fluorescence intensity.

# ---- Image-level medians (keep image-level variance in the LMM) ----
ros_per_image <- ros_final %>%
  group_by(Stimulus, Experiment, ImageNumber) %>%
  summarise(median_ROS = median(ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(Stimulus = factor(Stimulus, levels = TREATMENTS_6))

# ---- Experiment-level summaries for plotting ----
ros_per_exp <- ros_per_image %>%
  group_by(Stimulus, Experiment) %>%
  summarise(median_ROS = median(median_ROS, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(Stimulus = factor(Stimulus, levels = TREATMENTS_6))

veh_exp <- ros_per_exp %>%
  filter(Stimulus == "Vehicle") %>%
  select(Experiment, veh_median = median_ROS)

ros_delta <- ros_per_exp %>%
  left_join(veh_exp, by = "Experiment") %>%
  mutate(
    delta_ROS = median_ROS - veh_median)

# ---- Fit LMM on log-ROS at image level ----
# Random effect: Experiment (3 batches)
# Fixed effect: Stimulus (6 levels, Vehicle = reference)
lmm_data <- ros_per_exp %>%
  mutate(log_ROS = log(median_ROS)) %>%
  filter(is.finite(log_ROS))

m_lmm <- lmer(log_ROS ~ Stimulus + (1 | Experiment),
              data = lmm_data)

# ---- Dunnett's test: each cytokine vs Vehicle ----
emm <- emmeans(m_lmm, ~ Stimulus)
dunnett <- contrast(emm, method = "trt.vs.ctrl", ref = "Vehicle")
dunnett_summary <- summary(dunnett, adjust = "mvt", infer = c(TRUE, TRUE))
dunnett_ci      <- confint(dunnett, adjust = "mvt")

pval_B <- tibble(
  contrast    = as.character(dunnett_summary$contrast),
  estimate_log = dunnett_summary$estimate,        # log fold change
  SE           = dunnett_summary$SE,
  df           = dunnett_summary$df,
  t.ratio      = dunnett_summary$t.ratio,
  p.value      = dunnett_summary$p.value,         # mvt-adjusted
  ci_lo_log    = dunnett_ci$lower.CL,
  ci_hi_log    = dunnett_ci$upper.CL
) %>%
  mutate(
    Stimulus = sub(" - Vehicle", "", contrast),
    Stimulus = factor(Stimulus, levels = TREATMENTS_6),
    fc       = exp(estimate_log),
    fc_lo    = exp(ci_lo_log),
    fc_hi    = exp(ci_hi_log),
    x_pos    = match(as.character(Stimulus), TREATMENTS_6),
    sig_mark = case_when(
      is.na(p.value)   ~ "",
      p.value < 0.001  ~ "***",
      p.value < 0.01   ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.05   ~ "*",
      p.value < 0.1    ~ ".",
      TRUE             ~ "ns"
    )
  )

cat("\n--- Panel B: LMM + Dunnett (vs Vehicle), mvt-adjusted ---\n")
print(pval_B %>%
        select(Stimulus, estimate_log, SE, df, t.ratio, p.value,
               fc, fc_lo, fc_hi, sig_mark) %>%
        mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(., 3))))

write.csv(pval_B, paste0(FIG_PREFIX, "_B_ros_treatment_stats.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

# ---- Plot: experiment-level deltas + mean with 95% CI crossbar ----
# CI is computed from the LMM contrasts (log scale) and back-transformed
# via the Vehicle baseline, so the crossbars reflect the actual inference.
veh_baseline <- mean(veh_exp$veh_median, na.rm = TRUE)

ci_for_plot <- pval_B %>%
  mutate(
    delta_hat   = veh_baseline * (fc   - 1),
    delta_ci_lo = veh_baseline * (fc_lo - 1),
    delta_ci_hi = veh_baseline * (fc_hi - 1)
  ) %>%
  select(Stimulus, delta_hat, delta_ci_lo, delta_ci_hi)

# Add a Vehicle row (reference, delta = 0, no CI)
ci_for_plot <- bind_rows(
  tibble(Stimulus = factor("Vehicle", levels = TREATMENTS_6),
         delta_hat = 0, delta_ci_lo = NA_real_, delta_ci_hi = NA_real_),
  ci_for_plot
)

# Dynamic y limits
all_y <- c(ros_delta$delta_ROS, ci_for_plot$delta_ci_lo, ci_for_plot$delta_ci_hi, 0)
yr   <- range(all_y, na.rm = TRUE)
pad  <- max(diff(yr) * 0.18, 0.0008)
star_y <- max(all_y, na.rm = TRUE) + pad * 0.55
y_min  <- min(all_y, na.rm = TRUE) - pad * 0.35
y_max  <- star_y + pad * 0.35

p_B <- ggplot(ros_delta, aes(Stimulus, delta_ROS, color = Stimulus)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40",
             linewidth = 0.4) +
  # 95% CI from LMM/Dunnett
  geom_errorbar(
    data = ci_for_plot %>% filter(!is.na(delta_ci_lo)),
    aes(x = Stimulus, ymin = delta_ci_lo, ymax = delta_ci_hi),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    width = 0.25, color = "grey30", linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  # Point estimate crossbar
  geom_crossbar(
    data = ci_for_plot,
    aes(x = Stimulus, y = delta_hat,
        ymin = delta_hat, ymax = delta_hat),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    width = 0.6, color = "black", linewidth = 0.45
  ) +
  # Individual experiments
  geom_point(aes(shape = Experiment), size = 2.2,
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.08, height = 0)) +
  # Significance marks
  annotate("text",
           x = pval_B$x_pos, y = star_y,
           label = pval_B$sig_mark, size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_color_manual(values = PAL_6, guide = "none") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Exp1" = 16, "Exp2" = 17, "Exp3" = 15)) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    limits = TREATMENTS_6,
    labels = function(x) parse(text = treatment_math_labels(x))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(y_min, y_max)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
  labs(
    title    = "ROS change relative to Vehicle (24 hr)",
    subtitle = "LMM on log(ROS) with Experiment as random effect; Dunnett's test vs Vehicle (mvt-adjusted)\nCrossbar = LMM estimate; whiskers = 95% CI; points = independent experiments",
    x = NULL,
    y = expression(atop(Delta ~ "median CellROX intensity", "(A.U., relative to Vehicle)"))
  ) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey40"))

p_B
```

```{r panel-C-ros-fold-change, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}
# Panel C: ROS fold change vs Vehicle, per (state × cytokine).
# Reports all 5 cytokines; avoids selecting IFNγ a priori from the same data
# that generated the morphology hypothesis.

fc_data_exp <- ros_final %>%
  group_by(Experiment, Stimulus, State) %>%
  summarise(median_ROS = median(ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

# Pair each cytokine with Vehicle within the same (Experiment, State)
fc_wide <- fc_data_exp %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Stimulus, values_from = median_ROS)

fc_long <- lapply(target_stimuli, function(stim) {
  fc_wide %>%
    select(Experiment, State, Vehicle, all_of(stim)) %>%
    rename(Treatment = !!stim) %>%
    mutate(Stimulus = stim,
           fc     = Treatment / Vehicle,
           log_fc = log(fc))
}) %>% bind_rows()

fc_stats <- fc_long %>%
  group_by(Stimulus, State) %>%
  summarise(
    n         = sum(!is.na(log_fc)),
    geomean_fc = exp(mean(log_fc, na.rm = TRUE)),   # geometric mean (matches t-test point estimate)
    tt        = list(
      if (sum(!is.na(log_fc)) >= 3)
        tryCatch(t.test(log_fc, mu = 0), error = function(e) NULL)
      else NULL
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    p.value = map_dbl(tt, ~ if (is.null(.x)) NA_real_ else .x$p.value),
    ci_lo   = map_dbl(tt, ~ if (is.null(.x)) NA_real_ else exp(.x$conf.int[1])),
    ci_hi   = map_dbl(tt, ~ if (is.null(.x)) NA_real_ else exp(.x$conf.int[2]))
  ) %>%
  select(-tt) %>%
  mutate(
    FDR = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
    sig_mark = case_when(
      is.na(FDR)   ~ "",
      FDR < 0.001  ~ "***",
      FDR < 0.01   ~ "**",
      FDR < 0.05   ~ "*",
      TRUE         ~ "ns"
    ),
    Stimulus = factor(Stimulus, levels = target_stimuli),
    State    = factor(State, levels = STATE_LEVELS)
  )

cat("\n--- Panel C: ROS fold change (cytokine/Vehicle) per state ---\n")
print(fc_stats %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(., 3))))

write.csv(fc_stats, paste0(FIG_PREFIX, "_C_ros_foldchange_stats.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

p_C <- ggplot(fc_stats, aes(State, geomean_fc, fill = State)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lo, ymax = ci_hi), width = 0.2, linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1.0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  geom_text(aes(y = ci_hi,
                label = sprintf("%.2f %s", geomean_fc, sig_mark)),
            vjust = -0.6, size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ Stimulus, nrow = 1,
             labeller = labeller(Stimulus = function(x)
               parse(text = treatment_math_labels(x)))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = STATE_COLORS, guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.18))) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
  labs(
    title    = "ROS fold change (cytokine / Vehicle) per state",
    subtitle = "Geometric mean with 95% CI; one-sample t-test on log(fc); BH-FDR across all tests; n=3",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Fold change (cytokine / Vehicle)"
  ) +
  theme(plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
        plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey40"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1, size = 8),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95"),
        strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"))

p_C
```

```{r panel-D-ros-state-treatment, fig.width=14, fig.height=3}
# Panel D: experiment-level median ROS by state within each treatment
# No single-cell pseudoreplication:
# 1) median per image within each state
# 2) median across images within each experiment
# 3) show experiment-level points

ros_state_img <- ros_final %>%
  group_by(Stimulus, Experiment, ImageNumber, State) %>%
  summarise(median_ROS = median(ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ros_state_exp <- ros_state_img %>%
  group_by(Stimulus, Experiment, State) %>%
  summarise(median_ROS = median(median_ROS, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    Stimulus = factor(Stimulus, levels = TREATMENTS_6),
    State = factor(State, levels = STATE_LEVELS)
  )

ros_state_summary <- ros_state_exp %>%
  group_by(Stimulus, State) %>%
  summarise(
    group_median = median(median_ROS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Stimulus = factor(Stimulus, levels = TREATMENTS_6),
    State = factor(State, levels = STATE_LEVELS)
  )

p_D <- ggplot(ros_state_exp, aes(State, median_ROS, color = State)) +
  geom_point(
    aes(shape = Experiment),
    size = 2.2,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.12, height = 0)
  ) +
 geom_crossbar(
  data = ros_state_summary,
  aes(x = State, y = group_median, ymin = group_median, ymax = group_median),
  inherit.aes = FALSE,
  width = 0.6,
  color = "black",
  linewidth = 0.35
) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ Stimulus, nrow = 1,
    labeller = labeller(Stimulus = function(x)
      parse(text = treatment_math_labels(x)))
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = STATE_COLORS, guide = "none") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Exp1" = 16, "Exp2" = 17, "Exp3" = 15)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  labs(
    title = "ROS by morphological state within each treatment (24 hr)",
    subtitle = "Points = independent experiments; horizontal line = group median",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Median CellROX intensity per experiment (A.U.)"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95")
  )

p_D
```

```{r stat-tests}
cat("\n============ Statistical Tests ============\n")

ros_exp_state <- ros_final %>%
  group_by(Experiment, State) %>%
  summarise(median_ROS = median(ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  complete(Experiment, State = STATE_LEVELS, fill = list(median_ROS = NA_real_))

ros_exp_treat <- ros_final %>%
  group_by(Experiment, Stimulus) %>%
  summarise(median_ROS = median(ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  complete(Experiment, Stimulus = TREATMENTS_6, fill = list(median_ROS = NA_real_))

# Test 1: RM-ANOVA, State effect
aov_state <- aov(median_ROS ~ State + Error(Experiment/State),
                 data = ros_exp_state %>% drop_na(median_ROS))
aov_summary <- summary(aov_state)
aov_p <- tryCatch(aov_summary[[2]][[1]]["State", "Pr(>F)"],
                  error = function(e) NA_real_)
cat(sprintf("\n1. RM-ANOVA (ROS ~ State, n=3 experiments):\n"))
cat(sprintf("   p = %.4f %s\n", aov_p, ifelse(aov_p < 0.05, "*", "ns")))

# Test 2: Pairwise State comparisons
state_pairs <- combn(STATE_LEVELS, 2, simplify = FALSE)
state_pairwise <- lapply(state_pairs, function(pair) {
  s1 <- ros_exp_state %>% filter(State == pair[1]) %>%
    arrange(Experiment) %>% pull(median_ROS)
  s2 <- ros_exp_state %>% filter(State == pair[2]) %>%
    arrange(Experiment) %>% pull(median_ROS)
  tt <- tryCatch(t.test(s1, s2, paired = TRUE), error = function(e) NULL)
  tibble(State1 = pair[1], State2 = pair[2],
         p.value = if (is.null(tt)) NA_real_ else tt$p.value)
}) %>% bind_rows() %>%
  mutate(FDR = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"))

cat("\n2. Pairwise State comparisons (paired t-test, BH-FDR, n=3):\n")
print(state_pairwise %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(., 3))))

# Test 3: Treatment vs Vehicle
veh_ros <- ros_exp_treat %>% filter(Stimulus == "Vehicle") %>%
  arrange(Experiment) %>% pull(median_ROS)

treat_stats <- lapply(setdiff(TREATMENTS_6, "Vehicle"), function(stim) {
  trt <- ros_exp_treat %>% filter(Stimulus == stim) %>%
    arrange(Experiment) %>% pull(median_ROS)
  tt <- tryCatch(t.test(trt, veh_ros, paired = TRUE), error = function(e) NULL)
  tibble(Stimulus = stim,
         p.value  = if (is.null(tt)) NA_real_ else tt$p.value,
         Delta    = median(trt, na.rm=TRUE) - median(veh_ros, na.rm=TRUE))
}) %>% bind_rows() %>%
  mutate(FDR = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
         sig_mark = case_when(
           is.na(FDR)  ~ "NA",
           FDR < 0.001 ~ "***",
           FDR < 0.01  ~ "**",
           FDR < 0.05  ~ "*",
           TRUE        ~ "ns"))

cat("\n3. Treatment vs Vehicle (paired t-test, BH-FDR, n=3):\n")
print(treat_stats %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(., 3))))

# Test 4: Spread vs Small_Round per treatment
ros_exp_state_treat <- ros_final %>%
  group_by(Experiment, Stimulus, State) %>%
  summarise(median_ROS = median(ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  complete(Experiment, Stimulus = TREATMENTS_6, State = STATE_LEVELS,
           fill = list(median_ROS = NA_real_))

cat("\n4. Spread vs Small_Round per treatment (paired t-test, n=3):\n")
for (stim in TREATMENTS_6) {
  spread_exp <- ros_exp_state_treat %>%
    filter(Stimulus == stim, State == "Spread") %>%
    arrange(Experiment) %>% pull(median_ROS)
  small_exp  <- ros_exp_state_treat %>%
    filter(Stimulus == stim, State == "Small_Round") %>%
    arrange(Experiment) %>% pull(median_ROS)
  
  if (sum(!is.na(spread_exp)) >= 3 && sum(!is.na(small_exp)) >= 3) {
    tt <- tryCatch(t.test(spread_exp, small_exp, paired = TRUE),
                   error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(tt)) {
      cat(sprintf("   %s: Delta=%.4f, p=%.3f %s\n",
                  stim,
                  median(spread_exp, na.rm=TRUE) - median(small_exp, na.rm=TRUE),
                  tt$p.value,
                  ifelse(tt$p.value < 0.001, "***",
                         ifelse(tt$p.value < 0.01, "**",
                                ifelse(tt$p.value < 0.05, "*", "ns")))))
    } else {
      cat(sprintf("   %s: t-test failed\n", stim))
    }
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("   %s: insufficient data (n<3)\n", stim))
  }
}
```

```{r panel-E-correlation, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
# Panel E: one point = one experiment within one treatment
# x = Spread-state fraction per (Stimulus, Experiment)
# y = median ROS per (Stimulus, Experiment)

spread_exp <- ros_final %>%
  count(Stimulus, Experiment, State) %>%
  group_by(Stimulus, Experiment) %>%
  mutate(Fraction = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(State == "Spread") %>%
  select(Stimulus, Experiment, Spread_fraction = Fraction)

ros_exp <- ros_final %>%
  group_by(Stimulus, Experiment, ImageNumber) %>%
  summarise(median_ROS_img = median(ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Stimulus, Experiment) %>%
  summarise(median_ROS = median(median_ROS_img, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

corr_df <- spread_exp %>%
  left_join(ros_exp, by = c("Stimulus", "Experiment")) %>%
  mutate(
    Stimulus = factor(Stimulus, levels = TREATMENTS_6),
    Experiment = factor(Experiment, levels = c("Exp1", "Exp2", "Exp3"))
  )

cor_result <- cor.test(
  corr_df$Spread_fraction,
  corr_df$median_ROS,
  method = "spearman"
)

cat(sprintf("\n5. Spearman (Spread fraction vs median ROS, experiment-level):\n"))
cat(sprintf("   rho = %.3f, p = %.3f\n",
            cor_result$estimate, cor_result$p.value))

label_df <- corr_df %>%
  group_by(Stimulus) %>%
  summarise(
    Spread_fraction = median(Spread_fraction, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_ROS = median(median_ROS, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Label = case_when(
    Stimulus == "IFNg"    ~ "IFNγ",
    Stimulus == "IL1beta" ~ "IL-1β",
    Stimulus == "TNFa"    ~ "TNFα",
    Stimulus == "IL6"     ~ "IL-6",
    Stimulus == "LPS"     ~ "LPS",
    Stimulus == "Vehicle" ~ "Vehicle"
  ))

p_E <- ggplot(corr_df, aes(Spread_fraction, median_ROS)) +
  geom_point(
    aes(color = Stimulus, shape = Experiment),
    size = 4.2, alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = label_df,
    aes(label = Label, color = Stimulus),
    size = 5.5, show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = PAL_6,
    name = "Treatment",
    labels = c("Vehicle", "LPS", "IFNγ", "IL-1β", "IL-6", "TNFα")
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("Exp1" = 16, "Exp2" = 17, "Exp3" = 15),
    name = "Experiment"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  labs(
    title = "Morphological shift vs ROS production",
    subtitle = sprintf(
      "Each point = one treatment summary from one independent experiment\nSpearman rho = %.2f, p = %.3f",
      cor_result$estimate, cor_result$p.value
    ),
    x = "Spread state fraction (per experiment)",
    y = "Median CellROX intensity (per experiment, A.U.)"
  )

p_E
```

```{r save-panels}
save_both <- function(plot, suffix, w, h) {
  ggsave(paste0(FIG_PREFIX, "_", suffix, ".png"),
         plot & transparent_theme,
         width = w, height = h, dpi = 600, bg = "transparent")
  ggsave(paste0(FIG_PREFIX, "_", suffix, ".pdf"),
         plot & transparent_theme,
         width = w, height = h, bg = "transparent")
}

save_both(p_B, "B_ros_per_treatment",    6,   3)
save_both(p_C, "C_ros_foldchange_per_state", 12, 4)
save_both(p_D, "D_ros_state_treatment", 14,   3)
save_both(p_E, "E_correlation",          8,   6)

write.csv(corr_df, paste0(FIG_PREFIX, "_correlation_data.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

ros_summary <- ros_final %>%
  group_by(Stimulus, State) %>%
  summarise(n = n(),
            mean_ROS   = mean(ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE),
            median_ROS = median(ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE),
            sd_ROS     = sd(ROS_intensity, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")
write.csv(ros_summary, paste0(FIG_PREFIX, "_ros_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n============ Figure 6 complete ============\n")
```
